<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bg_surface_raised" <<<<<<< HEAD app:cardCornerRadius="18dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" ======= app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/radius_medium" >>>>>>> final app:strokeColor="@color/border_subtle" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_message" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" <<<<<<< HEAD android:padding="12dp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" /> ======= android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" android:maxWidth="320dp" android:padding="@dimen/space_3" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="14sp" /> >>>>>>> final
